query: UPDATE pillar_configs SET pillarName = 'BOSS', teams = '[]' WHERE id = 1; INSERT INTO pillar_configs (pillarName, teams, isActive) VALUES ('Executive', '[]', true), ('Games', '[]', true), ('Entertainment', '[]', true), ('Studios', '[]', true), ('Horizon', '[]', true);
